meta.name: bilibili-benchmark-v1
meta.description: Initial benchmark manifest for Bilibili-targeted video understanding comparison between MVP and ViDove.
notes: This manifest is for case organization first, not full automatic scoring yet.
Fill mvp_dir and vidove_dir after both engines have been run on the same sample.
Use expected_challenges to explain why a sample is valuable.
The first batch below contains selected Bilibili-style candidates chosen for representative coverage, not yet fully resolved to final BV IDs/URLs.

general: Prefer publicly accessible Bilibili videos with stable playback pages.
Prefer 2-8 minute clips or videos that can be clipped to that range.
Prefer single-speaker or dominant-speaker narration for first-round benchmarking.
Prefer Mandarin-first audio with relatively clear speech and limited background music.
Avoid highly copyrighted film/TV reposts for the first benchmark set.
Avoid videos that require strong visual-only understanding in v1.
commentary_case: Should include named entities, internet-style phrasing, or domain wording.
Should be close to Bilibili explanation/commentary style.
tutorial_case: Should have clear topic structure or steps.
Should be suitable for chapter segmentation evaluation.
Prefer videos with moderate screen text or technical vocabulary.
context_heavy_case: Should reflect stronger Bilibili platform flavor or internet-context dependence.
Prefer samples where plain transcript alone may miss part of the meaning.
Can include meme-heavy or cultural-context-heavy explanation.
live_mock_case: Should be longer and more conversational.
Should resemble a stream clip, podcast clip, or long unscripted commentary.
Useful for future migration toward rolling or live summarization.

cases.candidate_title: 2026 网飞爆剧！她编造的奢侈品卖遍全球，自己却惨死水沟《莎拉的真伪人生》
cases.notes: Chinese commentary / explanation video close to the target Bilibili understanding scenario. Selected because it is narration-heavy, internet-native, and close to the intended Bilibili summary use case.

cases.candidate_title: 【全289集】比付费还强10倍的自学剪辑全套教程，全程通俗易懂，别再走弯路了，小白看完速通PR剪辑！
cases.notes: Chinese tutorial / knowledge-sharing candidate with very clear structure. Good for chapter quality, topic segmentation, and future OCR/screen-text fusion. First-round use should clip only a short segment rather than run the full video.

cases.candidate_title: 一口气看完《除恶》：2026悬疑新剧，精彩到炸，全员恶人，一集就上头。
cases.notes: Bilibili-style context-heavy candidate with stronger platform flavor. Useful for testing internet-style framing, title-summary alignment, and eventual danmaku/comment fusion potential.

cases.candidate_title: 【阿斗】爆肝4个月，世界评分最高的电视剧一次看爽！详细解说《绝命毒师》1-5季
cases.notes: Long-form commentary candidate chosen as a bridge toward future live-summary evaluation. It should be clipped to a representative 3-5 minute span for the first benchmark round.
